ddls:
CREATE TABLE "polls" (
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poll */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the poll */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic or category of the poll */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the poll */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the poll was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the poll was last updated */,
  "poll_type" TEXT /* Type of poll (e.g., single-choice, multiple-choice, ranked-choice) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the poll starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the poll ends */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the poll (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the poll is created */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the poll */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll being interacted with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user interacting with the poll */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks or votes cast by the user */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction was last updated */,
  "vote_option" TEXT /* Specific option or options the user voted for */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., vote, view) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the interaction (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location (city, state) of the user when interacting */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user for security and fraud detection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_interactions_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., creator, voter) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the user is located */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)
